creator: mdh_lists@yahoo.com
text: The page at http://www.freebsd.org/releases/6.4R/schedule.html contains a link to http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/faq/misc.html#DEFINE-MFC (the link text is "MFC").  The URL to which it links does not have the DEFINE-MFC tagged, nor does it contain any information regarding the definition of the term MFC.
